About.label: The company behind the code
About.p1: We are a team of engineers and automation specialists based in Lima, Peru. For over 5 years we've built custom technology solutions for businesses looking to scale their operations without increasing their operational burden.
About.p2: Our approach combines professional software development with applied artificial intelligence — from WhatsApp bots to full ERP systems with SUNAT integration and electronic invoicing modules.
About.p3: Every project is treated as our own: we get involved from requirements gathering to post-launch support. Agile methodology, direct communication and measurable results from the first delivery.
About.quote: Automation doesn't replace people — it frees them to do what only they can do.

erp.title: Why your business needs a custom ERP, not a generic one
erp.excerpt: Generic ERPs cover 70% of any company's processes. The remaining 30% is where your competitive edge lives — and no off-the-shelf software will solve it.

whatsapp.title: Official WhatsApp API vs. unofficial solutions: risks and benefits
whatsapp.excerpt: Using the official WhatsApp Business API isn't just compliance — it's the difference between scaling confidently or getting blocked at the worst possible moment.

saas.title: How an inventory SaaS can cut your operational losses by 40%
saas.excerpt: Poorly managed inventory is the silent issue bleeding profitability from any business with physical stock. Here are the real numbers.
